---
title: "Home"
---

# Minkyu Song

Computer Science undergraduate at Yonsei University.

## Site Metrics

<div id="analytics-panel" class="analytics-panel">
  <p class="analytics-title">Cloudflare Analytics</p>
  <p class="analytics-value" id="analytics-value">Pending setup</p>
  <p class="analytics-note">This space is reserved for public traffic metrics after Cloudflare Web Analytics integration.</p>
</div>
